defaultSenderHelp: Max. 11 alphanumeric or 16 numeric characters. Empty = seven.io account default. Important: alphanumeric sender IDs (e.g. 'MyCompany') cannot receive SMS replies — only numeric phone numbers allow inbound SMS.
defaultGetRepliesHelp: When enabled, SMS are sent via a temporary shared pool number so recipients can reply. Replies arrive within 48 hours. Within 2 weeks seven.io tries to assign the same pool number — not guaranteed. Free, no own number needed. Available for DE, AT, CH, US, PL.
inboundIntervalHelp: 0 = disabled. Two options to receive inbound SMS: ① Shared pool (free) — enable 'Enable replies' above, no own number needed, replies arrive within 48 h, available for DE/AT/CH/US/PL. ② Own inbound number (~€20/month, permanent, reliable) — rent in seven.io dashboard.
pricingCountry: Country code for pricing (e.g. DE, US)
pricingCountryHelp: ISO country code to filter pricing data. Leave empty to load prices for all countries.
